query:
SELECT b.id, b.clientName, b.ptsRef, b.currentStage, b.grossCost, b.expectedCommission,
  cc.id AS claimId, cc.status AS claimStatus, cc.claimedAt, cc.paidAt
FROM bookings b
LEFT JOIN commission_claims cc ON cc.bookingId = b.id
WHERE b.id = 810001 OR b.ptsRef = '810001'
LIMIT 5;
